# Tempest Touch

> Non-custodial cryptocurrency payment gateway for e-commerce. Accept BTC,
> ETH, stablecoins, and Lightning payments with automatic fee handling and
> real-time settlement — funds go directly to merchant wallets, never held
> by Tempest Touch.

## What We Do
- Non-custodial crypto checkout for online stores (no asset custody risk)
- Multi-chain support — Bitcoin, Ethereum, EVM L2s, Lightning (LNURL-pay)
- Real-time payment confirmation with webhook notifications
- Built-in escrow and dispute resolution for merchant↔customer protection
- Merchant dashboard, invoices, payouts, reputation, and OAuth-based API
